records.body_region: Abdomen — hepatobiliary system, kidneys, urinary bladder, uterus, ovaries

ocr.verbatim:
Name of Patient: 
Ref. By: 
Age / Sex: 28 Years / Female
Date: 19.03.2026
Investigation: USG of Whole Abdomen

USG OF WHOLE ABDOMEN
LIVER: Normal in size (12.15 cm). Normal parenchyma echotexture. No focal lesion IHBR
Dilation is seen. P.V.- normal.
CBD: Not dilated. No intraductal calculi seen.
GALL BLADDER: Multiple mobile calculi noted in GB lumen, largest measuring 9 mm.
PANCREAS: Normal in size & outline. Parenchyma echo is normal. Pancreatic duct is not
dilated.
SPLEEN: Normal in size (9.5) cm. Parenchymal echogenicity appears normal.
KIDNEYS:
RT. KIDNEY: Normal in shape and size — (11.1 x 4.4) cm. parenchymal echogenicity is
normal. Cortical thickness is normal. Cortico medullary differentiation is well maintained.
Collecting system appears normal. No evidence of calculus or any pathological abnormalities
is seen.
LT. KIDNEY: Normal in shape and size — (11.3 x 4.9) cm. Parenchymal echogenicity is
normal. Cortical thickness is normal. Cortico medullary differentiation is well maintained.
Collecting system appears normal. No evidence of calculus or any pathological abnormalities
is seen.
URINARY BLADDER: Distended with normal wall thickness. No diverticula/SOI/calculus seen in
lumen.
Others: No evidence of any free fluid in the peritoneal cavity.
UTERUS: Enlarged in size — (10.3 x 5.1 x 4.7) cm.
Endometrial thickness: 8.4 mm
OVARY: Lt. Ovary: 3.2 x 2.2 cm 
 Rt. Ovary: 3.1 x 1.7 cm

IMPRESSION:
• CHOLELITHIASIS.
• BULKY UTERUS

Suggested: Clinical correlation.

MD (Radiodiagnosis)
Reg. No- 16216(OCM)

records.summary: This is a typed ultrasound report of the whole abdomen for a 28-year-old female patient, dated March 19, 2026. The report details findings on the liver, gallbladder, pancreas, spleen, kidneys, urinary bladder, uterus, and ovaries, concluding with an impression of cholelithiasis and a bulky uterus.
key_observations: Multiple mobile calculi in the gallbladder, largest 9 mm
Enlarged uterus (10.3 x 5.1 x 4.7 cm) with 8.4 mm endometrial thickness
Normal-sized kidneys with no calculi or abnormalities
Diagnosis of cholelithiasis and bulky uterus
Report signed by MD (Radiodiagnosis) with registration number 16216(OCM)

records.stage_evidence: Diagnostic ultrasound images without contrast or intervention
records.summary: A set of nine grayscale ultrasound images showing the hepatobiliary system, likely the gallbladder and biliary ducts, from multiple long-axis views. The images are diagnostic in nature and appear to be from a pre-procedure assessment.
key_observations: Nine ultrasound images arranged in a 3x3 grid.
Images show anatomical structures consistent with the hepatobiliary system.
Ultrasound machine brand 'DACON' visible in the corners of each image.
Images are grayscale with varying levels of echogenicity.
Text 'Page 1/1' and 'sound Image Report' visible on the left margin.

limitations: Low contrast and grainy image quality.
Images are dark and lack clear definition of internal structures.
Photograph of printed ultrasound images, not the original digital scan.
